assertion: DeepSeek-R1 14B (distill) produces correct, well-structured Python code with proper docstrings and input validation, but with extreme latency (247s for a simple function) due to verbose chain-of-thought reasoning that outputs 26K chars of thinking before 3K chars of actual code. Structured output tasks are ~10x faster (23s).
evidence: CG-4 (PoT Verifier): 247.13s, 26846 chars output, final code correct with docstring + validation + test cases, but 3 intermediate versions before final clean output
SO-5 (Error Report): 23.25s, valid JSON, correct severity/timeline/root cause, production-quality output
On M4 Max 36GB: model loads fully in GPU, inference runs but reasoning overhead dominates latency
Think chain is ~80% of output volume — post-processing needed to extract clean responses
